sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state: (0,1), (1,0), (1,2) are N, (2,1) is still W
# Need to click (2,1) at correct row 61, col 31

# First verify current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current right panel:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 9:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min([p[0] for p in b]) - 49) // 5
        c = (min([p[1] for p in b]) - 24) // 5
        print(f"  ({r},{c}): {n['color']}")

# Click (2,1) at row 61, col 31
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 61, 'col': 31}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAfter click (2,1) at row 61, col 31:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 9:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min([p[0] for p in b]) - 49) // 5
        c = (min([p[1] for p in b]) - 24) // 5
        print(f"  ({r},{c}): {n['color']}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}, Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
